$comment: Deterministic est_cost source for the token ledger (TOKEN_POLICY.md). Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. THESE ARE PLACEHOLDERS — Liam fills real provider rates. Placeholder prices are sanctioned; token COUNTS are never invented (never.md #7).
revisit: Monthly provider pricing check, or on any provider price change or model-generation jump. Last touched: 2026-07-19.
